entries.description_en: If an injury occurs at the junction of the duodenum and jejunum, code to the jejunum.
Note : Fetal demise as a result of abdominal injury to a pregnant female is a consequence of trauma, not an injury itself. Term of pregnancy, per se, is not a factor in determining AIS severity code.
